name: Gran Caffe Visconteo
content: The food was good. I taught one of my American colleagues the art of taking forever to drink an espresso here. An older Italian man passing by the cafe cracked some joke that was likely about American tourists and directed at us, so I had to explain to my American colleague that this was not something to be mortally offended by, as making fun of American tourists is simply a traditional European pastime. The cafe is located across from the plaza in front of the Duomo.
